description: Name of the expense. Could also be the name of the vendor or creditor executing the transaction
Amount of the transaction/cashflow in the statement. Do not include any mathematical signs (positive, negative etc)

Either 1 or 0. If the transaction is a cash output, return 0. If the amount has been credited or it's an inflow, return 1. This can be understood also from any negative or non-negative amounts in the bank statement against the amount.
Any additional remarks given in the statement. If none, only output 'null'.
